# Example interview

## [00:00-00:18] Host | Opening

What changed in software work during the last year?

## [00:18-00:50] Guest | Software bottlenecks

Writing code became faster, but delivery still depends on choosing the right problem, checking the result, and understanding the customer.

## [00:50-01:22] Guest | Software bottlenecks

The implementation bottleneck is smaller. The constraints have moved into coordination, validation, and responsibility.

## [01:22-01:44] Host | Boundary

So every company becomes five times more productive immediately?

## [01:44-02:16] Guest | Boundary

No. A local improvement does not multiply the entire system when other constraints remain.
